name: MosaicoXLPlus
comment:
600W IP66 zoomable LED image projector with CMY and framing shutter.
Mosaico XL+ is an extremely powerful outdoor LED image projector for long-range projection of textures, images and logos onto buildings and landscapes. Built in a durable IP66 die-cast housing, the Mosaico XL+ offers a phenomenal output of 21'600 lumens and an extensive set of features including linear CMY+CTO colour mixing system and profile to precisely shape the projection area. The exceptional zoom ranges from 6° to 50° allowing this fixture to be installed at any distance making it versatile in both near-field and long-throw installations, awesome for static and animated facade building lighting.

revision.text: Rev 009 - as FW 1_1_02_0 - DMX Fault features added in Control Channel
